title: goobay LED Candles White Real Wax Candle 10x15 cm with Timer Function Warm White Battery-Operated 3D Wick for Elegant Decoration, Safe and Stylish Lighting 77776
availability_text: Only 7 left in stock (more on the way).
features: Elegant LED candles with timer function: this LED candle combines genuine wax tradition with modern technology. No risk of fire!
Versatile LED candles: use flickering LED candles as stylish candles for dinner party or Christmas decoration. Perfect for living and dining rooms, or to enhance a party.
Safe electric candles: LED candles offer a safe lighting solution, ideal for places where real candles are too dangerous. No soot, no combustion.
Practical LED candles with timer function: thanks to the timer function, LED candles light up for 6 hours and repeat the cycle every day. Perfect for mood lighting.
Battery-powered candles for every mood: This LED candle uses 3 AAA batteries to create a warm, harmonious atmosphere.
description: From the manufacturer The perfect decorative highlight for your lighting magic on all occasions – from elegant tablescapes to cosy Christmas evenings. The minimalist design blends seamlessly into all interiors and décor styles.
